name: Prometheus
description: Open-source monitoring system with a time-series database. Pull-based metrics collection with PromQL query language.

name: Grafana
description: Visualization and analytics platform. Build dashboards for metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch, and more.

name: Datadog
description: Cloud-scale monitoring and analytics platform. Infrastructure metrics, APM, logs, and real user monitoring in one place.

name: New Relic
description: Full-stack observability platform. Application performance monitoring, infrastructure tracking, and error analytics.

name: Zabbix
description: Enterprise-grade monitoring for networks, servers, and cloud. Agent-based and agentless data collection with alerting.

name: Nagios
description: Industry-standard infrastructure monitoring. Monitors hosts, services, and network devices with plugin-based checks.

name: Uptime Kuma
description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring tool with a clean UI. Supports HTTP, TCP, DNS, and ping checks with notifications.

name: Netdata
description: Real-time performance monitoring with per-second granularity. Auto-detects thousands of metrics with zero configuration.

name: Checkmk
description: Infrastructure and application monitoring with auto-discovery. Monitors servers, networks, databases, and cloud resources.

name: PagerDuty
description: Incident management platform for on-call alerting and response. Routes alerts, manages escalations, and coordinates response.

name: Grafana Tempo
description: Scalable distributed tracing backend by Grafana Labs. Cost-efficient trace storage using object storage, no indexing required.

name: Sentry
description: Application monitoring and error tracking. Captures exceptions with full stack traces, breadcrumbs, and release tracking.

name: Bugsnag
description: Error monitoring and stability management. Tracks errors across web, mobile, and backend with release health dashboards.

name: Rollbar
description: Real-time error tracking and debugging platform. Groups errors intelligently and integrates with development workflows.

name: Raygun
description: Crash reporting and real user monitoring. Identifies software errors and performance issues affecting end users.

name: Airbrake
description: Error and performance monitoring for web apps. Tracks exceptions with deploy tracking and performance insights.

name: Honeybadger
description: Exception, uptime, and check-in monitoring. Zero-noise error tracking with smart grouping and context-rich reports.

name: GlitchTip
description: Open-source error tracking compatible with Sentry SDKs. Self-hosted alternative with uptime monitoring included.

name: Highlight
description: Full-stack monitoring with session replay, error tracking, and log management. See exactly what users experienced.

name: Elastic Stack (ELK)
description: Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana for log ingestion, search, and visualization. The standard open-source log platform.

name: Grafana Loki
description: Log aggregation system by Grafana Labs. Indexes metadata instead of full text for cost-efficient log storage.

name: Graylog
description: Centralized log management and analysis. Collects, indexes, and analyzes structured and unstructured log data.

name: Fluentd
description: Unified logging layer for collecting and routing log data. 500+ plugins to connect any data source to any destination.

name: Logstash
description: Server-side data processing pipeline. Ingests logs from multiple sources, transforms them, and sends to Elasticsearch or other stores.

name: Splunk
description: Enterprise platform for searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine-generated data. Powerful search processing language.

name: Papertrail
description: Cloud-hosted log management by SolarWinds. Real-time tail, search, and alerts across all your systems and apps.

name: Fluent Bit
description: Lightweight log processor and forwarder. Low-footprint alternative to Fluentd designed for containerized and embedded environments.

name: Vector
description: High-performance observability data pipeline. Collects, transforms, and routes logs and metrics with low resource usage.
